prompt: Studio product photograph of a CLOSED spiral-bound notebook lying flat on a brushed-concrete grey surface, with the silver-coil spine running along the top edge. The cover is a soft warm-cream cardstock with a slight matte texture. A short wooden carpenter's pencil with a flat oval cross-section lies diagonally across the cover. The cover is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO print, NO debossing, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the cover surface — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Camera positioned at a slight three-quarter overhead angle, soft diffused daylight from camera-right, gentle shadow under the spiral coil and along the right edge of the cover. Slightly desaturated palette — the cream cover is warm-neutral. Working-contractor catalog feel, NOT bullet-journal minimalist, NOT luxury-stationery. No other items, no people.
